dataset: Eclipse SUMO iTETRIS Bologna Pasubio Scenario

pi_items.source: Verified via 'setup_task.sh' and 'setup_sumo.sh' scripts which configure and launch sumo-gui with the bologna_pasubio scenario configuration ('/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg').
Verified against the task description instructions which explicitly direct the agent to save the screenshot to this exact path using 'scrot /home/ga/SUMO_Output/occupancy_coloring.png'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio scenario from the Eclipse SUMO community (originally iTETRIS), verified by inspecting the provided dataset and setup scripts which launch the simulation on this scenario. The expected output file path matches the direct instructions given to the agent to capture the traffic density visualization screenshot.
